$description: Component-level tokens for cognitive accessibility mode. These override the default component tokens when cognitive mode is enabled, providing larger touch targets, more generous padding, and simplified visual treatments.

paddingX.$description: Increased horizontal padding (24px, up from 16px) for larger hit area.

paddingY.$description: Increased vertical padding (12px, up from 8px) — ensures min 48px touch target with 18px text.

borderRadius.$description: Larger radius (12px, up from 8px) for softer, less harsh appearance.

paddingX.$description: Increased horizontal padding to match primary button cognitive sizing.

paddingY.$description: Increased vertical padding to match primary button cognitive sizing.

borderWidth.$description: 2px border (up from 1px) for clearer element definition on secondary (outline) buttons.

padding.$description: Increased card padding (24px, up from 16px) for more breathing room.

borderRadius.$description: Larger radius (16px, up from 12px) for softer appearance.

borderWidth.$description: 2px border for clearer card boundary definition.

gap.$description: 16px gap between card content elements (up from default ~8-12px).

paddingY.$description: Increased vertical padding (12px, up from 8px) — ensures min 48px touch target.

itemMinHeight.$description: Minimum navigation item height — 48px touch target.

itemPaddingX.$description: Increased horizontal padding (20px) for navigation items.

itemPaddingY.$description: Increased vertical padding (12px) for navigation items.

itemGap.$description: 8px gap between navigation items to prevent mis-taps.

minHeight.$description: Minimum list item height — 48px touch target.
